episodes.title: Nancy Mace Calls for Release of Epstein Files on Fox News
episodes.description:
We are in the pursuit of justice.
I was one of four Republicans who stood firm from the beginning, pushing with resolve to sign the discharge petition and release the Epstein Files. I have voted, repeatedly, to stand with the survivors and to oppose any effort to obscure the truth.
It has now been months since the initial release of these files, yet the work remains unfinished. The names of co-conspirators are still hidden behind redactions, and critical documents from the Department of Justice and the Southern District of New York continue to be withheld from public view. This lack of transparency is an affront to the survivors and a disservice to the American people.
We will not be deterred, and we will not stop asking the difficult questions. Our citizens deserve a government answerable to the people and a justice system worth its name. It is time for full disclosure.
Release the Epstein Files.
